name: 272 Estadio De Pattaya
addressFull: 45/14 Soi Chaiyaporn Withi 27, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Google Maps currently displays an 08:00 opening time. Pattaya Sports Club lists 10:00-midnight, so the full current weekly schedule should be confirmed.

courts.notes: Around Pattaya reports two halls with six courts each.

booking.method: Phone or Line; an external coach also arranges courts
booking.leadTime: The external coach requests 1-2 days for coach-handled bookings
booking.notes: Around Pattaya last checked the rate in May 2025; Fastwork independently describes ฿200 as the court value in current coaching packages. Confirm the venue tariff.

coaching.groupRate: External bilingual coach: ฿3,500 for eight group hours used within two months, court included
coaching.privateRate: External coach: ฿6,500 for ten one-to-one hours used within six months, court included
coaching.notes: The advertised Thai/English group meets at 272 Estadio on Monday and Wednesday. This is an independent coach, not a venue-run academy.

englishEvidence: A current coach listing explicitly offers Thai/English group sessions at 272 Estadio on Monday and Wednesday. This confirms an English coaching path, though reception English remains unverified.
facilities: swimming pool reported by local visitor guides

audience.whoShouldSkip: Players sensitive to heat or needing flexible early warm-up time should confirm conditions and rules before booking.

praise: Thai reviewers describe a large, clean venue with two court sections; one says the green-court side is easier to see on.
Local guides consistently mention parking, rental equipment and the on-site pool.
complaints: A Thai review says the enclosed hall can feel very hot and poorly ventilated.
Another reviewer objected to being refused a dark-court warm-up ten minutes before the booked hour.
Badminton shoes are mandatory; a reviewer says loan shoes exist but sizes may be unavailable.

comparison.differentiator: Two six-court halls, published low-cost rentals and a scheduled bilingual coaching group.

sources.label: Official Facebook identity
sources.accessNote: Identity URL resolved through Pattaya Sports Club; the Facebook page itself was not directly inspectable.
